scripts.dev:build: pnpm -s build:shared && STAMHOOFD_ENV=stamhoofd lerna run dev:build
scripts.dev:watch-env: npx nodemon --quiet --signal SIGTERM --watch shared/build-development-env --ignore './shared/build-development-env/dist/' --ext .ts,.json,.sql,.mjs --exec 'pnpm -s dev || exit 0'
scripts.dev:watch-env:full: npx nodemon --quiet --signal SIGTERM --watch shared/build-development-env --ignore './shared/build-development-env/dist/' --ext .ts,.json,.sql,.mjs --exec 'pnpm -s dev:full || exit 0'
scripts.dev: concurrently -r 'pnpm -s dev:init' 'pnpm -s build:shared:watch' 'wait-on shared/locales/dist/index.d.ts && lerna run dev --ignore @stamhoofd/calculator --stream --parallel'
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -r 'pnpm -s dev:init' 'pnpm -s build:shared:watch' 'wait-on shared/locales/dist/index.d.ts && lerna run dev:full --stream --parallel'
scripts.test:playwright: pnpm -s build:shared && pnpm --dir backend/app/api -s build:playwright:pre && pnpm --dir tests/playwright -s test
scripts.test:playwright:ui: pnpm -s build:shared && pnpm --dir backend/app/api -s build:playwright:pre && pnpm --dir tests/playwright -s test --ui
scripts.build:shared:watch: npx nodemon --quiet --signal SIGTERM --watch shared --watch backend/shared --ignore './shared/*/dist/' --ignore './backend/shared/*/dist/' --ext .ts,.json,.sql,.mjs --exec 'pnpm -s build:shared || exit 0'
scripts.clear:global:shared: bash -c 'shopt -s nullglob && rm -rf shared/*/dist && rm -rf shared/*/*.tsbuildinfo'
scripts.build:global:shared: echo '\033[35m[BUILD]\033[0m Building globally shared dependencies...' && pnpm --dir shared/types -s build && pnpm --dir shared/test-utils -s build && pnpm --dir shared/utility -s build && pnpm --dir shared/build-development-env -s build && pnpm --dir shared/excel-writer -s build && pnpm --dir shared/structures -s build && pnpm --dir shared/object-differ -s build && pnpm --dir shared/locales -s build && echo '\033[35m[BUILD]\033[0m Done building globally shared dependencies.'
scripts.clear:backend:shared: bash -c 'shopt -s nullglob && rm -rf backend/shared/*/dist && rm -rf backend/shared/*/*.tsbuildinfo'
scripts.build:backend:shared: echo '\033[35m[BUILD]\033[0m Building shared backend dependencies...' && pnpm --dir backend/shared/queues -s build && pnpm --dir backend/shared/env -s build && pnpm --dir backend/shared/i18n -s build && pnpm --dir backend/shared/sql -s build && pnpm --dir backend/shared/email -s build && pnpm --dir backend/shared/models -s build && pnpm --dir backend/shared/logging -s build && pnpm --dir backend/shared/crons -s build && pnpm --dir backend/shared/middleware -s build && echo '\033[35m[BUILD]\033[0m Done building backend shared dependencies.'
scripts.clear: bash -c 'shopt -s nullglob && rm -rf tests/*/*.tsbuildinfo && rm -rf tests/*/dist && rm -rf shared/*/dist frontend/app/*/dist frontend/app/*/dist-playwright backend/shared/*/dist backend/app/*/dist && rm -rf shared/*/*.tsbuildinfo frontend/app/*/*.tsbuildinfo backend/shared/*/*.tsbuildinfo backend/app/*/*.tsbuildinfo'
scripts.ship: node ./.development/increase-structures-version.js && pnpm -s clear:shared && pnpm -s build:shared && lerna version --exact --force-publish --yes --no-private && lerna publish from-git --yes --no-private --otp $(op item get NPM --otp || :)
scripts.ship:force: node ./.development/increase-structures-version.js --force && pnpm -s clear:shared && pnpm -s build:shared && npm login && lerna version --exact --force-publish --yes --no-private && lerna publish from-git --yes --no-private --otp $(op item get NPM --otp || :)
scripts.ship:fix: lerna publish from-git --yes --no-private --otp $(op item get NPM --otp || :)
scripts.translate:compress: pnpm --dir shared/locales -s build && pnpm --dir .development/i18n-uuid merge-duplicates && pnpm --dir .development/i18n-uuid unused-keys
scripts.translate: pnpm translate:keys && pnpm translate:compress && pnpm translate:machine
scripts.dns: export SERVER_IP=127.0.0.1 && cd .development && source loadenv.sh && coredns
